title: Jacobaeastrum virgineum
taxonomy: Jacobaeastrum virgineum is classified as a genus of extinct plants in the family Bennettitaceae. This genus includes several species of cycadeoids, which are ancient seed plants that date back to the Mesozoic Era. Bennettitaceae is a family of extinct plants that were related to modern cycads and conifers. The classification of Jacobaeastrum virgineum is part of ongoing research in the field of paleobotany, which studies the evolution and diversity of ancient plants. Further studies are needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of this genus.
